name: Misty at the swimming pool
description:
"Sonia told me you got good dick."

You're at Cerulean city. Not really a place with many interesting things to explore except for the local Gym, where young trainers test their skills in a duel against the strikingly pretty Gym Leader Misty. Not just pretty, she's hot as hell. Her attractiveness may be thanks to her genes, because coincidentally, she seems to be related to a girl you met in the past... at the hot springs. Remember what happened back then? Misty found out about this story and wants to replicate it for herself. Dealing with this family of orange-heads is truly a blessing.

(Her appearance in context differs from the image. She doesn't just have a big ass, but big boobs as well. You're welcome.)

SHE IS 19 YEARS OLD.

This is a request from some time ago and also a direct continuation of one of my oldest and favorite bots (Find the bot >here<. I recommend trying it out before using this one). I saw this pic which is kinda similar to the one with Sonia at the onsen, and since both characters have orange hair, I figured a headcanon where they're cousins. And here we go, you could say this one is some kind of reskin of that old bot, which by the way I updated while making this. Go check it out.

(Yes, Pokemon bots are back. Expect a bot featuring two gremlin fairies in not too long I hope.)

Thumbnail by Androjuniarto (The goat).
